---
name: Safety report
about: Report a safety, privacy, or supply-chain concern
title: "[Safety]: "
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

## Before You Post

Do not include secrets, private config contents, exploit details, cookies, keys, or `.env` contents in a public issue.

Use GitHub private vulnerability reporting if available.

## Summary

Describe the concern without sensitive details.

## Affected Area

Skill, adapter, script, hook, documentation, or package-manager behavior?

## Suggested Direction

What safer behavior would you expect?
